About Me

From student to software engineer

I'm a final-year Software Engineering student at the University of Management and Technology, Lahore — currently in my 7th semester, building toward a career as a full-stack engineer with a strong UI/UX foundation.

My work spans solo builds, a paid freelance client project, and a 3-person Final Year Project where I lead UI/UX design for an AI-powered platform. I care about interfaces that feel as solid as the code behind them.

Outside of shipping projects, I'm currently deepening my coursework in Machine Learning, Information Retrieval. — building toward applied AI work, not just claiming it.

Machine LearningInformation RetrievalData MiningUI/UX DesignWeb Development
